display.purpose: Landing hero and page-defining moments only.

headline.purpose: Page titles: mode home, nation sheet, player profile.

lede.purpose: Intro paragraphs and emphasized row values; one notch above body, never headings.

body.purpose: Prose and table content; 65–75ch prose cap, tables may run denser.

body-compact.purpose: Explanatory copy inside panes and filter/control text.

data.purpose: The ledger register: feed rows, captions, table metadata; pairs with tabular numerals.

kicker.purpose: Tracked-uppercase micro section labels and the hero kicker; never running text.

shadows.name: ambient-thin-night
shadows.purpose: Resting float on thin material (nav, small chrome), dark mode.

shadows.name: ambient-deep-night
shadows.purpose: Resting float on thick frost (hero, cards, panels), dark mode.

shadows.name: ambient-thin-day
shadows.purpose: Resting float on thin material, light mode.

shadows.name: ambient-deep-day
shadows.purpose: Resting float on thick frost, light mode.

shadows.name: lift
shadows.value: deepen the pane's own ambient (~+4px offset, +20% alpha)
shadows.purpose: Hover/focus response: a stronger float, not a new shadow. Glass panes only.

motion.name: spring-lift
motion.purpose: Hover lift on glass panels; reduced-motion replaces with border brighten.

motion.name: parallax-clamp
motion.value: max displacement a few % of image size
motion.purpose: Spatial Scene depth displacement stays subtle (Apple-like); disabled to static under prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Spatial Scene
components.description: Signature identity layer: depth-parallax battle scene (offline-processed image + depth map) behind the mode's scrim/veil, glass DOM above. Placeholder gradient stands in for imagery here.
components.html: Glass floats above the scene — text never touches imagery
components.css: .ds-scene { position: relative; height: 220px; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-scene-img { position: absolute; inset: -4%; background: linear-gradient(160deg, #2a3542 0%, #16202c 45%, #3d3325 100%); transition: transform 400ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-scene:hover .ds-scene-img { transform: translate(1.5%, 1%) scale(1.02); } .ds-scene-scrim { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: rgba(4, 6, 10, 0.55); } .ds-scene-glass { position: absolute; left: 24px; right: 24px; bottom: 24px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(1.4); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(1.4); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.16); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.2); border-radius: 26px; padding: 16px 24px; } .ds-scene-caption { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.96); font-size: 0.875rem; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-scene-img, .ds-scene:hover .ds-scene-img { transition: none; transform: none; } }

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one amber action on a screen; amber fill + black text in both modes.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #F0B94A; color: #000; padding: 6px 12px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; transition: opacity 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #F0B94A; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action; hairline border, mode's muted ink (night form shown).
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); padding: 6px 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.16); border-radius: 4px; font-weight: 400; font-size: 0.875rem; transition: color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.96); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #F0B94A; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Glass Panel
components.description: The core surface: ultra-clear liquid glass (live-accepted) lit by the scene behind it. Night form shown; day form uses rgba(255,255,255,.1) with Day Hairline.
components.html:
Ground Realistic

4 records · 3 holders · 57% complete
components.css: .ds-glass-panel { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); backdrop-filter: blur(50px) saturate(2); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(50px) saturate(2); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.16); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.2), 0 30px 60px -30px rgba(0,0,0,0.8); border-radius: 26px; padding: 24px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.96); transition: transform 220ms cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.3, 0.64, 1), box-shadow 220ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-glass-panel:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.2), 0 34px 60px -30px rgba(0,0,0,0.95); } .ds-glass-title { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-glass-body { margin: 0; font-size: 1rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-glass-panel { transition: border-color 180ms; } .ds-glass-panel:hover { transform: none; border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3); } }

components.name: Leaderboard Row
components.description: Signature: rank in metal (top 3 only; Day Gold/Silver/Bronze by day), holder link, tabular count pushed right.
components.html:
1. 1Ace2
  2. 2Floppa1
  3. 4Maverick1
components.css: .ds-lb { list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.96); } .ds-lb-row { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 12px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-lb-rank { width: 1.5rem; text-align: right; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); } .ds-lb-rank-gold { color: #FFD75E; } .ds-lb-rank-silver { color: #D6DBE2; } .ds-lb-name { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.96); text-decoration: underline; text-underline-offset: 2px; } .ds-lb-name:hover { color: #F0B94A; } .ds-lb-count { margin-left: auto; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); }

components.name: Removed Chip
components.description: Metadata tag for vehicles no longer obtainable; informative, never alarming.
components.html: removed
components.css: .ds-chip-removed { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 6px; }

components.name: Mode Switcher Nav
components.description: Primary navigation with theme toggle slot; active mode in Medal Amber (Deep form by day).
components.html:
WT·RECORDS
GRBGABARBAAB
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; padding: 12px 24px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06); backdrop-filter: blur(12px) saturate(1.3); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px) saturate(1.3); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.16); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.96); } .ds-nav-brand { font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.025em; } .ds-nav-modes { display: flex; gap: 4px; } .ds-nav-mode { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 4px; transition: color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-nav-mode:hover { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.96); } .ds-nav-mode:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #F0B94A; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-nav-mode-active { color: #F0B94A; } .ds-nav-theme { margin-left: auto; background: transparent; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.16); border-radius: 4px; padding: 4px 8px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.875rem; } .ds-nav-theme:hover { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.96); } .ds-nav-theme:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #F0B94A; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Text field for player/vehicle search; hairline border, amber focus (Deep form by day).
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="search" placeholder="Search players or vehicles" aria-label="Search" />
components.css: .ds-input { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.96); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.16); border-radius: 4px; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 1rem; width: 100%; max-width: 28rem; transition: border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #F0B94A; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #F0B94A; }

narrative.overview: WT Records is a hall where verified feats hang under lit glass — and the hall has windows. Behind everything sits the system's signature element: the Spatial Scene, a curated War Thunder battle scene processed offline with depth AI so the subject separates from its background and parallaxes on pointer and gyro. The scene is the visual identity, swapping per nation and per branch. In front: frosted-glass surfaces with hairline borders, tabular numerals, and instrument-panel restraint. The hall has two lighting states, never two identities — by night the Night Hangar base with dark scrim and white frost; by day the Daylight Hall base with light veil and milky frost. Structure, spacing, radii, type, and every named rule are identical in both; only the light changes.
keyCharacteristics: The Spatial Scene: depth-parallax battle imagery (subject-separated, offline-processed) as the identity layer in both modes
Two lighting states, one hall: Night Hangar / Daylight Hall bases with mirrored ink, hairline, and scrim/veil tokens
Frosted-glass surfaces: backdrop blur + saturate, 1px hairline borders, inset top highlight, 22–26px radii
One warm accent (Medal Amber; Medal Amber Deep as its text-safe day form) at ≤10% of any screen; metals only where rank is real
Tabular numerals everywhere; the number is the hero
Floating panes: every glass surface carries a soft ambient shadow at rest, deepening on lift

rules.name: The Same Hall Rule
rules.body: Light and dark are the same hall under different light. Tokens flip (base, ink, hairline, scrim/veil, deep accent/metal forms); structure, spacing, radii, type, and layout never do. A screen that rearranges between modes is broken.

rules.name: The Earned Metal Rule
rules.body: Gold, silver, and bronze (and their day forms) color only ranks 1, 2, and 3 — never headings, never icons, never decoration.

rules.name: The One Amber Rule
rules.body: Medal Amber (or its Deep day form) covers at most 10% of any screen: primary action, active mode, current selection, record emphasis. Two competing amber elements in one view means one of them is wrong.

rules.name: The Tabular Rule
rules.body: font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums applies globally, no exceptions. A kill count that shifts width when it changes is a bug.

rules.name: The Floating Pane Rule
rules.body: Every glass surface floats: soft, negative-spread ambient shadow at rest, deepening on hover/focus lift. Shadows belong to glass panes only — never to text, buttons inside panes, or non-glass elements.

rules.name: The Sandwich Rule
rules.body: Text never sits directly on the Spatial Scene. Between any scene and any text there is always the mode's scrim/veil, a glass surface, or both. Contrast is enforced by the layer stack, not hoped for.

dos: Do treat the Spatial Scene as first-class: every background ships as image.jpg + image-depth.png with a static fallback and a reduced-motion path; scenes swap per nation/branch.
Do keep the sandwich intact (The Sandwich Rule): scene → scrim/veil → glass → text, in both modes.
Do flip tokens between modes and nothing else (The Same Hall Rule).
Do keep all numerals tabular (The Tabular Rule) — kills, counts, BRs, percentages.
Do give every glass surface the full material: backdrop blur + saturate, the mode's 1px hairline, Glass Highlight inset top edge, 22–26px radius.
Do keep amber ≤10% of any screen, using Medal Amber Deep for text/active states by day; reserve metals for ranks 1/2/3 with their day forms.
Do ship every interactive component state-complete: default, hover, focus-visible, active, disabled.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion with a real alternative for every animation — parallax, count-ups, lifts.
donts: Don't use "Inter-everywhere generic SaaS styling; the templated dashboard look" (PRODUCT.md anti-reference).
Don't build "generic SaaS card-in-card layouts; nested cards" (PRODUCT.md anti-reference).
Don't set "gray-on-color text" (PRODUCT.md anti-reference): on amber fills use black; on glass use the mode's ink ramp.
Don't put text directly on scene imagery — no exceptions (The Sandwich Rule).
Don't use raw Medal Amber or the night metals as text on Daylight Hall — their Deep/Day forms exist precisely for that.
Don't warm the light base toward cream/sand/beige; Daylight Hall stays cool and chroma-neutral.
Don't use side-stripe borders, gradient text, or the hero-metric template.
Don't put shadows on anything that isn't a glass pane (The Floating Pane Rule) or metal colors on anything that isn't a rank.
